subject: [PATCH 7/8] nfsd: fix fcache_disposal UAF by inlining dispose state into nfsd_net

2026-06-01.patch_summary: This patch fixes a use-after-free (UAF) bug in the NFS daemon's file cache disposal mechanism by inlining the dispose state into the nfsd_net struct, eliminating the need for a separately allocated struct. This change prevents the global shrinker, laundrette, and fsnotify callbacks from dereferencing a freed pointer. The patch also removes the alloc/free helpers and simplifies the per-net file cache management.
